titleStmt.title: SII 9.486: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 486. (A.R. No. 96 of 1913.) ON A PILLAR LYING IN THE OUTER PRAKARA OF THE MALLIKARJUNA TEMPLE AT KAMBADURU, KALYANDRUG TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1434, Āṅgirasa, Kārtika, śu. 12, corresponding to A.D. 1512 October 23 Friday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Rāyasada Koṇḍamarasayya made a gift of land in Kaṁbhadūru situated in Kundurupe-sīme for the service of the god Mallikārjuna of the village. The gift was made for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrī gaṇādhipataEṁ
namaḥ . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśā
livāhanaśakhavaruṣa 1434 neya
Āṁgirasasaṁvatsarada kārtika śu 12 lu
śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājapa
ramēsvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkru
ṣṇarāyamahārāyarugaḷa kā
ryake kartarāda rāyasta koṁ
ḍamarasayanavaru kaṁbhadūra śrī
mallikārjunadēvarige sarvvamānya
vāgi biṭudu . rāyaru namage pā
lisida kuṁdurupeya sīmeya voḷaga
ṇa kaṁbhadūra keṟeya keḷage pū
rvamodalāgi saluva mānyastaḷada
gade paṁḍēnahaḷi puravargake saluva
kuṁṭe kāluvestaḷada gade catusīme
voḷagāda holanu yidanu kṛṣṇarā
yamahārāyarige dhar(ṁ)mavāgabē
keṁdu śrīmallikārjuna(ṁ)dēvarige sarva
mānyavāgi koṭevu yidake Āvanā
nobanū tapidare vāraṇāsiya taḍi
yalu gōbrā(ṁ)hmara vadhisida pā
takadalu hōharu taṁde
tāyanu gaṁge ta
ḍiyalu madhyānada
hottinalū koṁda
pāpadalu hōha
ru svānamāṁsa
va tiṁdavarū .
svadatāṁ dviguṇaṁ
pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ paradatā
nupālayō . pa
radatāpahārē
ṇa (.) svadattaṁ niṣpha
laṁ bhavē
t . maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.486 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
